raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction fine-tuning with scaling of both model size and number of tasks, incorporating Chain-of-Thought (CoT) data to improve reasoning abilities, including unlocking zero-shot reasoning capabilities
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, few-shot and zero-shot reasoning, multi-task instruction following, open-ended generation, complex reasoning tasks, multilingual support, and zero-shot Chain-of-Thought reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing language models through instruction fine-tuning and multi-task scaling for improved generalization and reasoning capabilities
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction fine-tuning with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and multi-task mixtures (up to 1,836 tasks)

raw_extraction.innovation: Continued pretraining on additional 500B tokens followed by instruction fine-tuning, combining continued pretraining with instruction tuning for enhanced performance
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, instruction following, and complex reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating the benefits of continued pretraining combined with instruction fine-tuning for improving model performance

raw_extraction.innovation: Unsupervised Language-to-Language (UL2) pretraining for 20k additional steps followed by instruction fine-tuning, demonstrating complementary improvements over standard instruction tuning alone
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified (same as PaLM-540B with additional UL2 steps)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, instruction following, and complex reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating the impact of advanced pretraining objectives like UL2 combined with instruction fine-tuning

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Chain-of-Thought (CoT) joint fine-tuning**, combining non-CoT and CoT datasets to improve performance on both reasoning and standard tasks while mitigating degradation observed in prior work.
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, zero-shot/few-shot reasoning, instruction-following, chat applications, and responsible AI benchmarks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling large language models to perform complex reasoning (CoT tasks) and general instruction-following without sacrificing performance on non-reasoning tasks.

raw_extraction.innovation: **Flan-PaLM** extends PaLM via instruction fine-tuning on a mixture of 1.8K tasks, including Chain-of-Thought (CoT) annotations, achieving superior zero-shot reasoning, usability, and alignment with human preferences while requiring minimal additional compute (0.2% of pre-training cost).
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot reasoning, chat interfaces, open-ended generation, responsible AI evaluation, and general-purpose instruction-following.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving usability, reasoning capabilities, and alignment of large language models through scalable instruction fine-tuning.

raw_extraction.innovation: **Flan-T5** applies instruction fine-tuning to the T5 architecture, outperforming baseline T5 models significantly across benchmarks while demonstrating compatibility with diverse architectures and pre-training objectives.
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual and cross-format question answering, natural language generation, and instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Extending instruction fine-tuning to encoder-decoder models (T5) to improve generalization and task performance.

raw_extraction.innovation: **Instruction fine-tuning** applied to T5 architecture, leveraging its sequence-to-sequence framework for enhanced generalization across tasks via few-shot prompting.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction following, multi-task generalization, zero-shot/few-shot learning, commonsense reasoning, and text generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Generalization to unseen tasks via instruction tuning in an encoder-decoder framework
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction fine-tuning with supervised learning using CoT mixture datasets (AQuA, CREAK, ECQA, ESNLI, GSM8K, QASC, QED, Sensemaking, StrategyQA)

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction fine-tuning applied to T5 models, demonstrating improved zero-shot and few-shot performance across tasks while maintaining robustness against biases.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus (C4), Wikipedia, and other multilingual datasets
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual text generation, translation, zero/few-shot reasoning, toxicity detection, bias mitigation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing sequence-to-sequence models through instruction fine-tuning for broader applicability and fairness.

raw_extraction.innovation: Instruction-finetuning of large language models to improve performance on downstream tasks via few-shot learning
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, instruction following, question answering, reasoning
